hero.subtitle: Guesthouse — Restaurant
hero.description: Discover an oasis of peace and luxury in the heart of Žitný ostrov. Villa Potoň combines elegance with nature for an unforgettable experience.

welcome.description: Discover a combination of comfortable accommodation, excellent cuisine and an atmosphere you'll love coming back to.

experience.headline_line1: Experience the atmosphere of true relaxation,
experience.title: Experience the Feeling
experience.subtitle: Accommodation, dining and relaxation under one roof

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: Our modern rooms offer everything you need for a pleasant and undisturbed stay – from privacy to practical amenities. Whether you come for relaxation or a short trip, you'll find comfort you can rely on.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Our restaurant offers fresh dishes prepared with an emphasis on quality and taste. The specialty is amazing Neapolitan pizza that you'll fall in love with from the first bite. Whether you choose from the à la carte menu or enjoy a peaceful breakfast, an experience awaits that will complement your stay.

bar.title: Neapolitan Pizza
bar.description: Authentic Neapolitan pizza made from quality ingredients following traditional methods, with soft airy dough and rich flavor you'll fall in love with from the very first bite.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

terrace.title: Terrace
terrace.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

parking.title: Private Parking
parking.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

accessibility.title: Rooms for People with Disabilities
accessibility.description: We are a modern pension with restaurant, located in Horná Potôň, 35km from Bratislava, 10km from Dunajská Streda. Our goal is to provide quality services so you will leave satisfied and happy.

quote.heading: Your comfort and satisfaction are the foundation of every
quote.subtitle: Whether you want to relax in a pleasant environment or enjoy great food, you will find what you are looking for with us.
quote.imageSubtitle: At Villa Potoň, every detail is designed to make you feel at home, with the peace of nature right outside your door.

activities.title: Where Every Day is Designed for You

zitny_ostrov.title: Žitný ostrov
zitny_ostrov.description: Discover the beauty of Žitný ostrov by the Danube, just a short distance from the villa, and enjoy peaceful walks or trips through the surrounding nature.

golf.title: Golf
golf.description: Enjoy a peaceful day at quality golf courses near Veľká Paka or Báč, ideal for beginners and experienced players alike, just about 10–15 minutes from the villa.

malkia.title: Malkia Park
malkia.description: Experience a unique encounter with big cats at the rescue park in Orechová Potôň, located just 5 minutes by car from Villa Potôň.

slovakia_ring.title: Slovakia Ring
slovakia_ring.description: Just about 5 minutes from the villa, adrenaline awaits at the Slovakia Ring circuit in Orechová Potôň – racing, go-karts, and unforgettable experiences.

thermalpark.title: Thermalpark
thermalpark.description: Relax in thermal pools and treat yourself to wellness at the Thermalpark in Dunajská Streda, approximately 10–15 minutes away by car.

xbionic.title: X-Bionic Sphere
xbionic.description: Discover the world of sports and relaxation at the modern X-Bionic Sphere complex in Šamorín, approximately 20–25 minutes by car from the villa. You'll find an equestrian area, professional sports facilities, fitness center, swimming pool, wellness, and options for active leisure for children and adults.

booking_cta.title: Book your
booking_cta.description: A reservation at Villa Potôň is more than just picking a date – it's the beginning of your relaxation on your own terms. Whether you're looking for a simple stay or want to treat yourself to a complete experience with excellent cuisine, we'll tailor everything to your comfort.

footer.claim: The perfect place for rest and experiences
